bad_vs_good_feature_contrast.good_reference_definition: winning trades with <= median hold and >= median MAE, falling back to fastest/best-MAE winners

entry_candidate_keys.direction: tighten cap / enable upstream extension gate
entry_candidate_keys.reason: Bad-MAE entries are extended above ES VWAP; use the entry gate to avoid chasing before relying on a veto.

entry_candidate_keys.direction: raise / enable upstream VWAP slope confirmation
entry_candidate_keys.reason: Bad-MAE entries have soft ES VWAP slope; make the entry require clearer VWAP momentum.

entry_candidate_keys.direction: raise / enable upstream VWAP acceleration confirmation
entry_candidate_keys.reason: Bad-MAE entries have weak VWAP acceleration; require acceleration before entry instead of only vetoing afterward.

entry_candidate_keys.direction: raise / enable upstream ES structure gate
entry_candidate_keys.reason: Bad-MAE entries have weak or mixed ES structure; require a stronger structure score before entry.

entry_candidate_keys.direction: raise / require a clearer higher high
entry_candidate_keys.reason: Veto fingerprints show weak higher-high follow-through; require more ES structure confirmation before entry.

entry_candidate_keys.direction: raise / enable upstream RSI momentum gate
entry_candidate_keys.reason: Bad-MAE entries have weak RSI; require stronger RSI momentum before entry.

representative_trades.entry_veto_reason: setup quality 43.17 <= 50.00; ES structure score 3 <= 3; ES structure higher-low -1.00 < 0.25; ES structure higher-high -0.75 < 0.00; ADX slope -3.9641 <= -1.0000

entry_improvement_hints.source_note: This enabled veto nearly matched deep-MAE rows. Prefer nudging the listed failed thresholds over adding a broad new filter.
entry_improvement_hints.suggested_use: Use this as the upstream-entry translation of a veto fingerprint. Prefer one of these entry keys when it expresses the same bad-entry condition without broad over-pruning; otherwise tune the surgical veto threshold.

fingerprints.description: Winning trades that reached profit quickly. Protect these from entry filters that only reduce throughput.
fingerprints.name: fast_winners

fingerprints.description: Winning trades with cleaner underwater behavior than the median winner.
fingerprints.name: low_mae_winners

fingerprints.description: Clean profitable extended-above-VWAP entries. Use these to avoid bluntly blocking the same extension that creates the edge.
fingerprints.name: extended_vwap_winners

good_trade_fingerprints.instructions: Do not recommend an entry filter that blocks these protected good-trade fingerprints unless the bad-MAE improvement is materially stronger than the lost PnL/throughput.

instructions: Use these concrete bad-MAE entries to tune narrow entry-veto or quality gates. When an enabled veto failed to catch a row, inspect which threshold excluded it. Prefer surgical switches/thresholds over broad pruning unless the leaderboard evidence supports the trade-off.
